reasoning: China does not currently operate military bases in BRICS countries. The likeliest candidate is the UAE, where US intelligence suspected the construction of a military facility at Khalifa Port, though the project was previously paused due to US pressure and its operational status as a military base before 2026 remains highly uncertain. Given the slow pace of developing and officially declaring military bases and the lack of strong indicators of an imminent announcements regarding BRICS members (like South Africa, Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, Saudi Arabia, Brazil, Russia), the probability remains low.
